sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110697" key="fqi/na" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φθίνα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110697.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mildew,</tr_> Id. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n110697.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> a kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">olive,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
